project.name: var-config (Java) — var.config.json reader
project.description: Reads var.config.json, the shared config file for all var tools (see conformance/config/README.md and doc/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-multi-language-authoring-design.md). Zero runtime dependencies: JSON parsing is hand-rolled, mirroring var-core's hand-rolled CanonicalJson writer.
